CMP-LANDINGZONE-KEY.name: cmp-landingzone
CMP-LANDINGZONE-KEY.description: Enclosing oe1 Production Landing Zone Compartment

CMP-LZ-PREPROD-NETWORK-KEY.name: cmp-lz-preprod-network
CMP-LZ-PREPROD-NETWORK-KEY.description: Preprod Workload Environment, Common Network Compartment

CMP-LZ-PROD-NETWORK-KEY.name: cmp-lz-prod-network
CMP-LZ-PROD-NETWORK-KEY.description: Prod Workload Environment, Common Network Compartment

GRP-LZ-NETWORK-ADMIN-KEY.name: grp-lz-network-admin
GRP-LZ-NETWORK-ADMIN-KEY.description: One-OE Landing Zone, Shared network administration group, including common OE network elements.

PCY-LZ-NETWORK-ADMIN-KEY.name: pcy-lz-network-admin
PCY-LZ-NETWORK-ADMIN-KEY.description: Allow grp-lz-network-admin group users to manage all network resources across the tenancy.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to read all-resources in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage virtual-network-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage dns in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage load-balancers in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage alarms in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage metrics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage orm-stacks in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage orm-jobs in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage orm-config-source-providers in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to read audit-events in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to read work-requests in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage instance-family in tenancy

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage volume-family in tenancy where all {request.permission != 'VOLUME_BACKUP_DELETE', request.permission != 'VOLUME_DELETE', request.permission != 'BOOT_VOLUME_BACKUP_DELETE'}
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage object-family in tenancy where all {request.permission != 'OBJECT_DELETE', request.permission != 'BUCKET_DELETE'}

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage file-family in tenancy where all {request.permission != 'FILE_SYSTEM_DELETE', request.permission != 'MOUNT_TARGET_DELETE', request.permission != 'EXPORT_SET_DELETE', request.permission != 'FILE_SYSTEM_DELETE_SNAPSHOT', request.permission != 'FILE_SYSTEM_NFSv3_UNEXPORT'}
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage bastion-session in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage cloudevents-rules in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to read instance-agent-plugins in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage keys in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to use key-delegate in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage secret-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage repos in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to read vss-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to read ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to use bastion in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to use bastion-session in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to use vaults in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to read logging-family in tenancy

PCY-RPC-REQUESTOR.name: pcy-rpc-requester
PCY-RPC-REQUESTOR.description: Open LZ policy for requesting RPC connections in the tenancy.
statements: Define tenancy Acceptor as ocid1.tenancy.oc1..aaaaaaaad5peu42knsfe22guml7b5eoz3eupjcgiwtugn3znbew7rmok2p7q
Allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage remote-peering-from in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-network
Endorse group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-network-admin' to manage remote-peering-to in tenancy Acceptor
